Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 6}Pressing {f 1 3 114} will allow you to view the affinities of a selected enemy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 7}The different affinities are {f 0 1 2}Slash{f 0 1 27}, {f 0 1 2}Strike{f 0 1 27}, {f 0 1 2}Pierce{f 0 1 27}, {f 0 1 2}Fire{f 0 1 27}, {f 0 1 2}Ice{f 0 1 27}, {f 0 1 2}Electricity{f 0 1 27}, {f 0 1 2}Wind{f 0 1 27}, {f 0 1 2}Light{f 0 1 27}, and {f 0 1 2}Dark{f 0 1 27}. The amount of damage inflicted depends on the enemy's affinity.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 8}{f 0 1 2}Unknown{f 0 1 27}: Affinity has not been used against an enemy yet.[n]{f 0 1 2}Weak{f 0 1 27}: More damage dealt and knock down possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 9}{f 0 1 2}Resist{f 0 1 27}: Damage is halved.[n]{f 0 1 2}Null{f 0 1 27}: No damage taken.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 10}{f 0 1 2}Repel{f 0 1 27}: Damage is deflected and inflicted on the one who initiated it.[n]{f 0 1 2}Drain{f 0 1 27}: Damage is absorbed by the target and heals them instead.[n]{f 1 1}
